channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Junction of Beeches Road and Little Herberts Road Charlton Kings, 23rd March
item.description:
I draw to your attention several potholes in Beeches Road. 1. Deep pothole at junction of Beeches Road with Little Herberts Road. 2. Deep pothole almost opposite Vineyards Close 3. Deep pothole further up Beeches Road... These are some of the worst I have encountered in my recent travels in Gloucestershire. Thank you for the recent repairs to potholes in Little Herberts Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs left near Park Lane junction, 23rd March
item.description:
There are road signs and sand bags left behind from previous road closures
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: There are several road signs left from previous road closures, 23rd March
item.description:
There are two piles of road signs, sandbags etc left along this section from a road closure last year. We’ve just done a village litter pick and these items are snow the only eyesore remaining!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Left hand filter light is not working, 23rd March
item.description:
Side of town hall , heading left up towards imperial/Montpellier gardens
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham

item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Large pothold that has recently got deeper, 23rd March
item.description:
Junction of little Herberts Road and Beeches Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Beeches Road, Cheltenham

item.title: Potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
2 potholes outside Redruth property in church lane if you can’t find it it’s the crater appeared in the road ! Been here for weeks and reported and apparently been addressed ? There are two holes in the mide Of the road one extremely large
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large trip hazard across the whole of the path caused by a tree root, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside number 7-8 next to the independent living centre in village Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.description:

item.title: Large expanse of surface missing, 23rd March

item.title: Pothole x 3 dinner plates, 23rd March
item.description:
Shallow pot hole down to the original core

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe

item.title: Large serving plate size pot hole, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside 17 Stancombe View Was reported in February and nothing’s been done. We’re now in March!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in pavement adjacent to drain repair required, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside number 15 Stancombe view, Winchcombe No Pavement, crumbling, uneven surface, elderly residents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandone LPG gas cylinder in shrubbery, 23rd March
item.description:
At the end of Delphinium Drive, where the footpath leads through to Kingsclere Drive. At the end nearest Delphinium Drive it is on your left, if you're facing Kingsclere Drive, and about two metres from the footpath under the shrubs. W3W ///agree.listed.mass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Delphinium Drive, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole very hard to avoid as many other filled in poorly potholes as well, 23rd March
item.description:
As you go towards Cheltenham Rd.with the Greyhound public house on your left, on the left hand side of the carriageway pothole hard to avoid
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multi pot holes in the road which can not be avoided when driving, it’s like an assault course., 23rd March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheldons Court, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham

item.title: Park bench is broken, 23rd March
item.description:
Park bench has 2 front wooden slats missing and could injure someone using it

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 23rd March
item.description:
CW: Abrupt Level Difference 2500mmx600mmx44mm TM: STOP and GO Next to lamp post No 23 (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet
